edge_hypothesis: QUIET PULSE — ULTRA-LOW ADX SUPERTREND: The Supertrend 8:1 champion (PF=1.921) has the highest ranging PF of any strategy at 2.914. But the supertrend_follow template requires ADX > adx_min (default 20), which is a TREND STRENGTH filter — it explicitly excludes low-ADX ranging environments. The champion's ADX10 variant (PF=1.907) proved that lowering this threshold improves results. This spec pushes further: adx_min=5 effectively removes the ADX gate entirely, allowing Supertrend direction flips during quiet, low-volatility ranging phases. The hypothesis: Supertrend flips during ranging are HIGH-QUALITY mean-reversion signals because the Supertrend bands contract during low volatility, so a direction flip indicates a genuine shift in the micro-trend. The ADX>20 gate was REMOVING these ranging signals, which is why the existing champion still has 'only' 85 trades — many quiet flips were filtered out. With adx_min=5 at 10:1+ R:R, we should see MORE trades AND higher ranging regime PF. Combined with SOL testing (higher beta = more Supertrend flips = more ranging signals). Invalidation: if PF drops significantly from the ADX10 champion, the ADX gate genuinely filters noise and ranging Supertrend flips are unreliable.

variants.name: supertrend_quiet_pulse_10to1
variants.description: Supertrend direction flip with ultra-low ADX gate (adx_min=5) on ETH/4h at 10:1 R:R. Captures ALL Supertrend flips including quiet ranging reversals. The ADX>20 champion trades 85 times; with adx_min=5 we expect 130-180 trades — a much larger sample. At 10:1 R:R (2.0x stop, 20.0x TP), even 10% win rate is highly profitable. This directly tests whether the ADX gate is protective or merely exclusionary.
entry_long: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from negative to positive (Supertrend direction change, bullish).
ADX_14 > 5 (ultra-low gate — essentially allows all direction flips).
entry_short: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from positive to negative (Supertrend direction change, bearish).
ADX_14 > 5 (ultra-low gate — essentially allows all direction flips).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (20.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (2.0x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode: if PF < 1.4 (below ADX10 champion), low-ADX Supertrend flips are noise
risk_rules: Stop loss at 2.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 20.0x ATR_14 from entry.

components.notes: SUPERTd_7_3.0 direction flip — captures ALL flips including quiet ranging reversals
ADX_14 > 5 — ultra-low gate removes the standard trending-only filter
ATR_14 for 2.0x stop / 20.0x TP — 10:1 R:R tail harvesting

variants.name: supertrend_quiet_pulse_sol_8to1
variants.description: Supertrend direction flip with ultra-low ADX (adx_min=5) on SOL/4h at 8:1 R:R. SOL has never been tested with Supertrend. SOL's higher beta means more Supertrend direction flips and larger absolute moves. The hypothesis: SOL's impulsive character produces cleaner Supertrend signals — when SOL's Supertrend flips, the move tends to be committed. Ultra-low ADX captures SOL's frequent ranging-to-trending transitions. 8:1 R:R is proven on ETH; this tests portability to SOL.
entry_long: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from negative to positive (Supertrend direction change, bullish).
ADX_14 > 5 (ultra-low gate for maximum signal capture on SOL).
entry_short: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from positive to negative (Supertrend direction change, bearish).
ADX_14 > 5 (ultra-low gate for maximum signal capture on SOL).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (16.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (2.0x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode: if SOL PF < ETH PF, Supertrend's alpha is ETH-specific, not generalizable
risk_rules: Stop loss at 2.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 16.0x ATR_14 from entry.

components.notes: SUPERTd_7_3.0 direction flip on SOL — first Supertrend test on this asset
ADX_14 > 5 — ultra-low gate captures SOL's frequent micro-trend reversals
ATR_14 for 2.0x stop / 16.0x TP — 8:1 R:R proven on ETH, testing portability

variants.name: supertrend_deep_tail_12to1
variants.description: Supertrend direction flip with moderate-low ADX (adx_min=8) on ETH/4h at 12:1 R:R. Tests the extreme R:R frontier for Supertrend. RSI slingshot validated 12:1 R:R (PF=1.270). Supertrend at 8:1 achieved PF=1.921 — if the R:R-PF relationship holds, 12:1 could push Supertrend PF even higher. ADX=8 is a middle ground between the champion's ADX=10 and the ultra-low ADX=5 — selective enough to avoid pure noise but open enough to catch ranging flips. 2.0x stop, 24.0x TP. Expected ~90-110 trades.
entry_long: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from negative to positive (Supertrend direction change, bullish).
ADX_14 > 8 (moderate-low gate — between champion ADX=10 and ultra-low).
entry_short: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from positive to negative (Supertrend direction change, bearish).
ADX_14 > 8 (moderate-low gate — between champion ADX=10 and ultra-low).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (24.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (2.0x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode: if PF < Supertrend 8:1 champion (1.921), extreme R:R has diminishing returns on Supertrend — 8:1 is the sweet spot
risk_rules: Stop loss at 2.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 24.0x ATR_14 from entry.

components.notes: SUPERTd_7_3.0 direction flip — champion template at extreme R:R frontier
ADX_14 > 8 — moderate-low gate, middle ground between ADX10 champion and ultra-low
ATR_14 for 2.0x stop / 24.0x TP — 12:1 R:R, pushing Supertrend beyond proven 8:1
